title: Conducting a Risk Assessment
scenario: Create a prompt that generates a comprehensive risk assessment for a new project, including identification, analysis, and prioritization of potential risks.
constraints: Must include a clear risk matrix
Must include a risk prioritization table

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated risk assessment accurately identify potential risks?
Is the risk analysis thorough and well-supported by data?
Is the risk prioritization table accurate and well-reasoned?
